test_sufficiency_summary: Direct image-runner tests pass, but bash cicd/tests/run-validations.sh fails in this branch because build-images.sh aborts under inherited errexit, so coverage is not sufficient for the GitHub Actions execution path.
documentation_accuracy_summary: The docs match the intended manual CD shim and default publish/deploy gating, but they currently overstate the working behavior because configured build stages can abort early under inherited errexit.
